_comment: SLICE_S5_CONTRACT.md §8 seam 14 / §11 OQ-1 RATIFIED (a): every admin string keyed from commit one; this catalog ships EN-only (staff-only audience, internal operators) pending the exception's own record in tools/i18n-lint/i18n-lint.mjs.
